summary: DevOps & Site Reliability Engineer with 2+ years of experience streamlining software delivery and managing mission-critical financial infrastructure. Expert in building CI/CD pipelines, implementing Infrastructure as Code (Terraform), and architecting observability stacks (Prometheus, Grafana). Proven track record in bridging the gap between development and operations to accelerate deployment cycles while maintaining 99.9% system availability.

experience.title: Technology Associate
bullets: Engineered automated release workflows and reliability frameworks for Tier-1 PnL Reporting applications.
Scaled infrastructure using Infrastructure as Code (IaC) and GitOps principles, enabling faster environment provisioning and consistent configuration management.
Implemented end-to-end CI/CD pipelines with integrated security scanning and automated unit testing, reducing deployment failures and improving lead time for changes.
Designed self-service observability dashboards (Grafana, Splunk), empowering developers with real-time insights and reducing Mean Time to Resolution (MTTR) by 2 hours.
Automated complex operational tasks and data pipelines using Python and Shell, eliminating manual toil and increasing team productivity by 40%.
Facilitated collaboration between Dev and Ops teams to drive incident post-mortems and proactive capacity planning for peak financial reporting periods.

projects.name: EKS Observability Platform
projects.technologies: AWS, Terraform, Kubernetes, ArgoCD, Grafana, Jaeger
bullets: Engineered a cloud-native platform on AWS EKS using Terraform; implemented GitOps with ArgoCD for automated, declarative application deployment.
Deployed an OpenTelemetry Collector stack to centralize distributed traces and metrics, providing full-stack visibility into microservices.

education.institution: Shri Ramdeobaba College of Engineering and Management
education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering in Electronics Engineering (CGPA 8.76)

skills.items: Jenkins, GitOps (ArgoCD), Terraform, Ansible, Docker, Kubernetes, Git
AWS, UNIX/Linux Systems, Financial Reporting Infrastructure
Microsoft AZ-900, AWS Cloud Practitioner, Cisco Networking
